idea.title: Idle Noodle Bar
idea.hook: Tap to cook and serve ramen for coins, hire auto-cooks that earn while you watch, unlock new dishes that multiply income, and renovate for permanent boosts.
idea.prototype: An in-session idle/incremental tycoon themed as a late-night ramen bar. Tap the pot to serve bowls for coins; spend coins on upgrades (tap power, faster burner), hire auto-cooks (passive income), buy global multipliers, and unlock 8 dish-station tiers that each x2.4 all income. A draining patience meter fed by a growing customer queue is the non-timer pressure (lose = crowd walks out, keep everything, tap Resume). RENOVATE prestige resets the run for a permanent +50% income star.
idea.mutation_of: classic idle-clicker tycoon loop (AdVenture Capitalist / Idle Miner family) themed to a cozy food-sim setting
idea.why_novel: Pairs the proven buy-upgrade -> watch-numbers-jump -> unlock-next-thing idle loop with a cozy ramen-bar theme and a genuine fail-pressure (the patience/crowd meter) so taps matter, instead of a pure no-fail clicker. Number juice (live ticking counter, coin pops, station-unlock fanfare) makes each jump feel earned.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Draining patience meter fed by a growing unserved-customer queue (resource scarcity + encroaching crowd); no countdown timer anywhere.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when patience <= 0 (too many customers wait unserved). Forgiving: RESUME keeps all coins/stations/upgrades.

sources.title: Idle tycoon (noodle/ramen bar) — addictive buy-upgrade -> watch-numbers-jump -> unlock-next loop
sources.snippet: Build an IDLE TYCOON themed as a noodle/ramen bar: tap to cook+serve bowls for coins; spend on upgrades + hire auto-cooks; unlock dishes/stations that multiply income; numbers climb; a PRESTIGE (renovate) reset multiplies future income. THE CATCH = the addictive buy-upgrade -> watch-numbers-jump -> unlock-next-thing loop across a 10-min session. In-session idle only (no cross-session offline accrual in this build).

sources.title: Idle/incremental is a perennial top web-game genre (cooking/restaurant idle a proven sub-niche)
sources.snippet: Restaurant / cooking idle games (idle diner, idle restaurant tycoon) are a consistently popular incremental sub-genre on mobile and web; the prestige-reset-for-multiplier loop is the canonical depth mechanic.

synthesizer_brief: Build ONE complete production-grade mobile-portrait-first vanilla-JS canvas idle tycoon (ramen bar). Addictive 10-min catch via constant new things to buy/unlock; strong number juice; renovate prestige for depth. In-session idle only; cross-session offline accrual deferred to the iterate pass.

alternatives.title: Idle Sushi Conveyor
alternatives.hook: Tap plates off a conveyor for coins; upgrade belt speed + chefs; unlock premium rolls that multiply income.
alternatives.why_novel: conveyor motion gives the idle income a satisfying physical read instead of an abstract counter

alternatives.title: Idle Coffee Cart
alternatives.hook: Pull espresso shots for coins; hire baristas; unlock drink tiers; expand to a chain of carts.
alternatives.why_novel: drink-tier unlock ladder + a multi-location expansion meta

alternatives.title: Idle Forge Smith
alternatives.hook: Hammer the anvil for gold; hire apprentices; unlock weapon tiers; prestige reforge for permanent power.
alternatives.why_novel: weapon-tier visuals make each unlock a tangible upgrade you can see
